## What problem does this skill solve?

<!-- One or two sentences. Who hits this problem, and when? -->

## Competitive research (required, Principle II)

Benchmark this idea against [github/spec-kit](https://github.com/github/spec-kit)
and at least ten other publicly available SDD tools. For each, note whether
it already solves this problem, and how.

- [ ] I checked spec-kit's own command surface for an existing equivalent.
- [ ] I checked at least ten other SDD tools/skill collections.
- [ ] I checked `references/skill-roadmap.md` to confirm this isn't already
      proposed (or I'm extending an existing proposal — link it below).

**Genuine contribution**: what does this skill do that none of the
researched tools already offer? (Principle II requires naming at least one.)

## Proposed shape

- **Persona / task**: who is this skill talking to, and what does it do for them?
- **Priority**: where would this land relative to the existing pipeline
  (P1-P9) and roadmap items?
- **Rough format**: what does it read, what does it produce?
